 {"id":"brenner_bot-voa","title":"TanStack Query: Migrate Document Viewers to Query Hooks","description":"# Goal
Migrate TranscriptViewer and DistillationViewer to use the new Query hooks instead of receiving data as props from Server Components.

## Background
Currently, document viewers receive pre-fetched data as props:
```typescript
// TranscriptViewer.tsx
interface TranscriptViewerProps {
  data: TranscriptData;  // Passed from Server Component
}
```

This works but means:
1. Data is re-fetched on every navigation
2. No caching between page visits
3. Server must parse on every request

## Migration Strategy

### Option A: Keep Server Fetch + Hydrate (Recommended)
Server Component prefetches, passes to client via HydrationBoundary.
- Best for SEO (content in initial HTML)
- Best for performance (no client-side loading flash)
- Query still provides caching for subsequent navigations

### Option B: Full Client-Side Fetch
Remove server prefetch, let Query handle everything.
- Simpler code
- Shows loading state on first visit
- Worse SEO

**We choose Option A** because the corpus pages are content-heavy and benefit from SSR.

## Implementation

### 1. Update corpus/[doc]/page.tsx
```typescript
import { HydrationBoundary, QueryClient, dehydrate } from '@tanstack/react-query';

export default async function CorpusDocPage({ params }) {
  const queryClient = new QueryClient();
  
  await queryClient.prefetchQuery({
    queryKey: ['corpus', 'doc', params.doc],
    queryFn: () => readCorpusDoc(params.doc),
  });

  return (
    <HydrationBoundary state={dehydrate(queryClient)}>
      <DocumentViewer docId={params.doc} />
    </HydrationBoundary>
  );
}
```

### 2. Update TranscriptViewer
```typescript
export function TranscriptViewer({ docId }: { docId: string }) {
  const { data, isLoading, error } = useCorpusDoc(docId);
  
  if (isLoading) return <TranscriptSkeleton />;
  if (error) return <ErrorBoundary error={error} />;
  
  // ... rest of component
}
```

### 3. Update DistillationViewer similarly

## Considerations

### Skeleton Components
Create loading skeletons that match the layout:
- TranscriptSkeleton: TOC + content placeholders
- DistillationSkeleton: Header + section placeholders

### Error Boundaries
Create error UI for:
- Document not found
- Parse failure
- Network error

### Backward Compatibility
During migration, support both patterns:
- Accept data as prop (old pattern)
- Use Query if docId provided (new pattern)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] TranscriptViewer uses Query hook
- [ ] DistillationViewer uses Query hook
- [ ] SSR still works (content in initial HTML)
- [ ] Navigation between docs is instant (cached)
- [ ] Loading states are graceful
- [ ] Error states are handled

## Files to Modify
- apps/web/src/app/corpus/[doc]/page.tsx
- apps/web/src/components/transcript/TranscriptViewer.tsx
- apps/web/src/components/distillation/DistillationViewer.tsx

## Files to Create
- apps/web/src/components/transcript/TranscriptSkeleton.tsx
- apps/web/src/components/distillation/DistillationSkeleton.tsx","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T23:15:54.657062985-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T23:48:57.870114122-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T23:48:57.870114122-05:00","close_reason":"Migrated document viewers to TanStack Query hooks with HydrationBoundary for SSR prefetching and navigation caching. Created DocumentContentClient.tsx client component that uses useCorpusDoc hook.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-voa","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-1r5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T23:16:17.466921916-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-wpb","title":"Create OperatorSymbol component with tooltip","description":"# Task

Create a distinctive inline component for Brenner operator symbols.

# The Operators

⊘ Level-split | 𝓛 Recode | ≡ Invariant-extract | ✂ Exclusion-test
⟂ Object-transpose | ↑ Amplify | ⊕ Cross-domain | ◊ Paradox-hunt
ΔE Exception-quarantine | ∿ Dephase | † Theory-kill | ⌂ Materialize
🔧 DIY | ⊞ Scale-check

# Design

Each operator symbol should:
1. Stand out from surrounding text (monospace font, slightly larger)
2. Have a subtle background pill
3. Show tooltip on hover with name + definition
4. Link to the operator palette page

# Visual

```
The ⊘ Level-split operator separates...
    ^
    └── pill background, hover shows tooltip
```

# Tooltip Content

- Operator name
- One-line definition
- 'Learn more →' link

# Props

```tsx
interface OperatorSymbolProps {
  symbol: '⊘' | '𝓛' | '≡' | '✂' | '⟂' | '↑' | '⊕' | '◊' | 'ΔE' | '∿' | '†' | '⌂' | '🔧' | '⊞';
  showName?: boolean;  // Show name alongside symbol
  linkToPage?: boolean; // Make it a link to operator page
}
```

# Operator Data

Create a data file with all operator definitions:
```typescript
export const OPERATORS = {
  '⊘': { name: 'Level-split', definition: 'Separate program from interpreter...' },
  // ...
};
```

# Animation

- Subtle scale on hover
- Tooltip fade in

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 14 operators render correctly
- [ ] Tooltips show on hover
- [ ] Links work if enabled
- [ ] Accessible (keyboard tooltip trigger)
- [ ] Works inline with text","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:22:13.719833091-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:29:11.392954222-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:29:11.392954222-05:00","close_reason":"Folded into brenner_bot-5so.4.5.2 (operator palette UI)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-wpb","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8yn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:23:06.878775514-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-x53","title":"Feature: Search Result Navigation","description":"Enhance the experience of navigating TO and viewing search results.

## Rationale

Finding a result is only half the job. Users need to:
1. Navigate to the exact location
2. See the match in context
3. Understand where they are in the document
4. Easily continue searching or return to results

## Scope

### Deep Linking
- Search result links to exact section anchor
- Scroll to the matched section
- Highlight the matched text temporarily (flash effect)

### Result Context
- After navigation, show breadcrumb of location
- 'Back to search' button
- Remember scroll position if user returns to search

### Multiple Results in Same Document
- If multiple matches in one document, show all
- Jump between matches (next/prev)
- Counter: 'Match 2 of 7'

### Mobile Considerations
- Bottom sheet for search results (already have bottom sheet component)
- Swipe to navigate between matches
- Easy dismiss and return to document

## Deliverables

- Deep link navigation to search results
- Match highlighting in document view
- Multi-match navigation within documents
- 'Back to search' flow

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Clicking result scrolls to exact match
- [ ] Match text highlighted temporarily
- [ ] Can navigate between multiple matches
- [ ] Can return to search results easily
- [ ] Mobile navigation feels natural","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:12.10567957-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T00:54:57.260866056-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T00:54:57.260866056-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented: query param in URLs for back-to-search, flash highlight on navigated sections, text highlighting from search terms, and floating Back to Search button. Multi-match navigation deferred for future enhancement.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-x53","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-cxl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:23.917557812-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-x53","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-d4p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:25.123596081-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
+{"id":"brenner_bot-x61","title":"Implement progressive loading for mobile transcript (retry)","description":"# Context
The linter keeps reverting progressive loading changes to TranscriptViewer.tsx.

# Implementation (apply manually or disable linter temporarily)

1. Add constants before TranscriptViewer function:
```tsx
const MOBILE_INITIAL_SECTIONS = 8;
const MOBILE_LOAD_INCREMENT = 8;
```

2. Add state and ref in the function:
```tsx
const [mobileSectionsLoaded, setMobileSectionsLoaded] = useState(MOBILE_INITIAL_SECTIONS);
const loadMoreSentinelRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
```

3. Add IntersectionObserver effect

4. Update scrollToSection to load target section first

5. Update mobile rendering to use `.slice(0, mobileSectionsLoaded)` and add sentinel element

See brenner_bot-s8x close reason for full details.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T02:31:20.863684673-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T02:31:31.585289101-05:00"}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-xfs","title":"Feature: E2E Integration Tests","description":"End-to-end browser tests with Playwright.

## Coverage Areas
- Page navigation and routing
- Corpus browsing functionality
- Sessions workflow (when lab mode enabled)
- Error pages and edge cases

## Requirements
- Detailed logging at every step
- Screenshots on failure
- Video recording option
- Parallel test execution
- Cross-browser testing (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)

## Philosophy
- Test real user flows
- No mocking - use test fixtures or real services
- Clear test output for debugging","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:09:41.975590001-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T23:40:18.614682048-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T23:40:18.614682048-05:00","close_reason":"Added comprehensive E2E tests for home and corpus pages. TypeScript fix for custom-reporter.ts. 27 new E2E test cases covering navigation, corpus browsing, distillations, and performance.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-xfs","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-o7a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:10:03.889226181-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-xq4","title":"Web: rawContent fallback for unparsable corpus docs","description":"When a corpus markdown file lacks the expected section structure (e.g., no PART headers / no '## N. Title' headers), our viewers currently render blank.

Add a raw markdown fallback so pages remain readable:
- parsers expose rawContent when structured parse yields 0 sections/parts
- viewers render rawContent as simple paragraphs (no fancy structure)

Acceptance:
- distillation + transcript docs never render an empty page
- existing structured docs render unchanged
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:41.320946466-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T22:38:01.747491986-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T22:38:01.747491986-05:00","close_reason":"Added rawContent fallback in transcript/distillation parsers and viewers so unparsable docs render as readable prose"}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-y6z","title":"Create BrennerQuote component with beautiful styling","description":"# Task

Create a stunning quote component specifically for Brenner quotes.

# Why Special Treatment

Brenner's quotes are the crown jewels of this project. They deserve more than gray italic text. Each quote should feel like wisdom worth savoring.

# Design

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ❝                                                      │
│    Exclusion is always a tremendously good              │
│    thing in science.                                    │
│                                                         │
│                           — Sydney Brenner, §42         │
│                                      [📋] [🔗]          │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

# Visual Elements

1. **Opening quote mark** - Large, decorative, in primary color (faded)
2. **Quote text** - Larger font, good line height, slightly italic
3. **Gradient border** - Left border with primary→accent gradient
4. **Background** - Subtle card background with glassmorphism
5. **Attribution** - Right-aligned, smaller, with § link
6. **Action buttons** - Copy, Share (appear on hover)

# Animation

- Fade + slide in on scroll reveal
- Subtle glow on hover
- Button reveal on hover

# Props

```tsx
interface BrennerQuoteProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
  source?: string;        // e.g., '§42' or 'Interview, 1998'
  sourceUrl?: string;     // Link to transcript section
  variant?: 'default' | 'featured' | 'inline';
}
```

# Variants

- **default** - Standard quote block
- **featured** - Larger, more prominent (for landing page)
- **inline** - Compact, for use within paragraphs

# Accessibility

- Proper `<blockquote>` semantics
- `<cite>` for attribution
- Focus states on buttons
- Screen reader announces as quote

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Quote renders with all visual elements
- [ ] Animation on scroll reveal
- [ ] Copy button works
- [ ] Share button opens share dialog
- [ ] § link navigates correctly
- [ ] All three variants work
- [ ] Accessible markup","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:21:53.472975562-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:29:11.423890236-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:29:11.423890236-05:00","close_reason":"Folded into landing quote presentation (brenner_bot-9o2)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-y6z","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8yn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:23:06.812013867-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-y6z","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-2n1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:23:06.847436402-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
